blocks.body: Past Perfect Continuous: Questions and Short Answers — Had you been...?, How long had she been...? i krótkie odpowiedzi z had / hadn't.

{"level":"A2–B1","intro":"W pytaniach Past Perfect Continuous stawiamy had przed podmiotem: Had + subject + been + V-ing?","rules":[{"label":"Had + subject + been + V-ing?","color":"emerald","text":"To podstawowy model pytania ogólnego.","example":"Had you been waiting long?"},{"label":"How long + had ... been + V-ing?","color":"blue","text":"Tak pytamy o długość trwania procesu przed momentem w przeszłości.","example":"How long had she been working there before she left?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"W krótkich odpowiedziach używaj had albo hadn't.","example":"Yes, I had. / No, they hadn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele pytań","intro":"Zapamiętaj szyk wyrazów w pytaniach Past Perfect Continuous.","items":[{"label":"Yes / No","title":"Had + subject + been + V-ing?","subtitle":"Had she been studying before the test?"},{"label":"How long","title":"How long had + subject + been + V-ing?","subtitle":"How long had they been waiting?"},{"label":"Short yes","title":"Yes, ... had.","subtitle":"Yes, I had. / Yes, he had."},{"label":"Short no","title":"No, ... hadn't.","subtitle":"No, we hadn't. / No, she hadn't."}]}

{"title":"2. Kiedy zadajemy takie pytania","sections":[{"label":"Proces przed innym wydarzeniem","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj, czy czynność już trwała przed innym wydarzeniem w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"Had they been waiting long before the doors opened?","ua":"Pytanie sprawdza wcześniejszą długość trwania."},{"en":"Had she been cooking when you arrived?","ua":"Mówiący pyta o proces w tle."}]},{"label":"Długość trwania przed momentem w przeszłości","color":"blue","description":"Pytaj, jak długo proces trwał przed konkretnym punktem w przeszłości.","examples":[{"en":"How long had you been studying before the exam?","ua":"To pytanie o czas trwania przed tym momentem."},{"en":"How long had he been working there by 2024?","ua":"Punkt w przeszłości wyznacza granicę."}]},{"label":"Przyczyna albo tło","color":"amber","description":"Wh-questions pomagają ustalić, dlaczego proces trwał albo jakie było tło sytuacji.","examples":[{"en":"Why had she been crying before the meeting?","ua":"Mówiący pyta o wcześniejszą przyczynę."},{"en":"Why had they been driving so fast?","ua":"Pytanie dotyczy wcześniejszej sytuacji."}]},{"label":"Krótkie odpowiedzi","color":"violet","description":"Odpowiadaj krótko, gdy pełne zdanie nie jest potrzebne.","examples":[{"en":"Had you been waiting long? Yes, I had.","ua":"Tutaj wystarczy krótka odpowiedź."},{"en":"Had she been sleeping? No, she hadn't.","ua":"W odpowiedzi użyj had albo hadn't."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Szyk wyrazów","intro":"Zobacz, gdzie stoją had i been w różnych pytaniach.","rows":[{"en":"Had you been waiting before I called?","ua":"had + you + been waiting","note":"pytanie ogólne"},{"en":"Had she been working there long?","ua":"had + she + been working","note":"pytanie o długość trwania"},{"en":"How long had they been living there before they moved?","ua":"how long + had + they + been living","note":"pytanie z how long"},{"en":"Had we been talking too loudly? No, we hadn't.","ua":"had ... been ... ? / no, ... hadn't","note":"krótka odpowiedź"}],"warning":"Nie mów Did you had been waiting? W tym czasie czasownik pomocniczy to już had."}

{"title":"4. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytania Past Perfect Continuous = Had + subject + been + V-ing?","Dla długości trwania często używaj How long had ... been + V-ing?","W krótkich odpowiedziach używaj had albo hadn't.","Nie dodawaj did, bo ten czas ma już swój czasownik pomocniczy."]}

{"title":"Lekcje Past Perfect Continuous","items":[{"label":"Forms and Use","url":"/pl/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-forms","current":false},{"label":"Negatives","url":"/pl/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-negatives","current":false},{"label":"Questions and Short Answers","url":"/pl/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-questions","current":true},{"label":"Time Expressions","url":"/pl/theory/past-perfect-continuous/past-perfect-continuous-time-expressions","current":false}]}
